name: od-product-hub
description: Development environment for the OD Product Hub WordPress plugin.

scripts.test:bootstrap-paths: wp-env run tests-cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/od-product-hub/tests/integration/bootstrap-paths.php && wp-env run tests-cli wp eval-file wp-content/plugins/od-product-hub/tests/integration/admin-bootstrap.php --context=admin && wp-env run tests-cli wp help odph release
scripts.test:integration: npm run test:database && npm run test:bootstrap-paths && npm run test:webhook && npm run test:email && npm run test:checkout && npm run test:account && npm run test:api && npm run test:release-cli && npm run test:operations && npm run test:i18n && npm run test:privacy && npm run test:site-health
scripts.build:i18n: wp-env run cli wp i18n make-pot wp-content/plugins/od-product-hub wp-content/plugins/od-product-hub/languages/od-product-hub.pot --domain=od-product-hub --exclude=vendor,node_modules,tests,build,dist
